subject: [SO] images for Honolulu release
commit_message:
[SO] images for Honolulu release

The first set of SO components for the Honolulu release on 1.8.X series.

Issue-ID: SO-2765
Signed-off-by: seshukm <seshu.kumar.m@huawei.com>
Change-Id: Ibab0e6733276b0ce68510550bfe723fdda92e8a3
